name: Brain Break
short_description: Brain Break is a minimalistic but not simple puzzle game. The object of the game is to move all the cubes to their positions of their color. It's not as easy as it sounds! The player can push one cube at a time, but not pull it.
detailed_description:
Can you survive in the desert?


About the Game

Brain Break is a minimalistic but not simple puzzle game. The object of the game is to move all the cubes to their positions of their color. It's not as easy as it sounds! The player can push one cube at a time, but not pull it.

FEATURES:


✔ Addictive gameplay;

✔ 20 different levels, from easy to difficult;

✔ Nice background music;

✔ Saving records.
